task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Metrics Dashboard** (Level 8)

ARCHETYPE: dashboard. Shape: web + backend, has a PAGE, and that page MUST contain 3 CHART nodes (2 is the threshold for 'dashboard' archetype; this task deliberately wants 3 to stress it). The distinguishing signal from kpi: multiple charts, not headline numbers. DO NOT build a KPI page with just `display sum_of_amount` — you must use actual `chart 'Title' as pie showing data` / `chart 'Title' as line showing data` / `chart 'Title' as b
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

owner is 'user@example.com'
allow signup and login

database is local memory

create a Orders table:
  amount (number), required
  status, default 'pending'
  created_at_date, auto

when user calls GET /api/orders:
  orders = get all Orders
  send back orders

when user sends order to /api/orders:
  requires login
  validate order:
    amount is number, required
  save order to Orders
  send back order with status 201

page 'Dashboard' at '/':
  requires login
  orders is an empty list
  on page load orders = get all from '/api/orders'
  
  chart 'Order Status Breakdown' as pie showing orders
  chart 'Orders Over Time' as line showing orders
  chart 'Amount by Status' as bar showing orders
